title: ADHD Pack
description: Food safe haven dimensions, stupid entities, and anything else that springs out of my mind. A hilarious and a mysterious mod in general.
body:
![ADHD PACK LOGO TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65300528f3410d331cc2f2718053df9c6b40e39.png)

This mod is still in development, leave suggestions on my youtube page, handle is @FormerRope

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/hI392yTPPdo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# THE ADHD PACK
> Adds new dimensions, biomes, vehicles, and anything else that seems fun! Everything is strung together using crafting, so anything in this mod can be achieved in survival!
> _Now compatible with JEI!_

# 🍕The Dinner Dimensions
### An expanse of dimensions consisting of common dinner foods

Currently included dimensions are:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Milk Dimension
- Cheese Dimension
- Mac And Cheese Dimension
- Pasta Dimension
- Burger Dimension
</details>



# 🐥The ADHEntities
### Very interesting entites that may reside in the overworld or in their respective dimensions

Currently included ADHEntities are:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Cheeserton the Chicken
- Milkerson the Milkman
- The Burger Boss
- Burger Minions


</details>



# 🚗Swagger Rides
### A collection of maybe useful vehicles? Who knows...

Currently included Swagger Rides are:

None have been added yet

# ✅Extras
### Extra stuff that is not related to anything else.

Currently included Extras are:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Tomato Biome (Overworld)

</details>



 

_Hope you enjoy the mod, and make sure to leave feedback!_
**-SD**
